name: /pr-corpus-decisions list command returns only pending unresolved entries by default
command: mkdir -p pr-corpus && printf '{"pattern_id":"p1","resolved":false}\n{"pattern_id":"p2","resolved":true}\n' > pr-corpus/decisions.jsonl && bash "$CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT/commands/pr-corpus-decisions.sh" --log pr-corpus/decisions.jsonl 2>out.txt && grep -q '"pattern_id":"p1"' out.txt && ! grep -q '"pattern_id":"p2"' out.txt && grep -q 'pending=1' out.txt && echo ok 1>&2
